prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the installation of a solar farm and battery energy storage system, which falls under the jurisdiction of planning regulations in England. It addresses infrastructure developments relevant to energy policy and land use planning applicable within England.
